# Handvantage — Vantage Workspace

> Handvantage is a Toronto-based company building Vantage Workspace, a sovereign agentic AI platform designed for regulated enterprises. The product is one platform — email, files, chat, meetings, documents, and an AI agent layer — running on infrastructure the customer controls, with a 7-Layer Defence Architecture mediating every prompt, tool call, and agent action. The company holds an A grade compliance posture at 100% across 11 regulatory frameworks, computed continuously from runtime evidence rather than annual attestation.

This site is the canonical source for Vantage Workspace product documentation, architecture, compliance posture, and editorial writing. All content is human-authored by the founding team.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://workspace.handvantage.com): The Sovereign Capability Partner thesis, the product overview, and the launch summary
- [Vantage Workspace (product)](https://workspace.handvantage.com/product): The six-pillar platform (email, files, chat, meetings, documents, agents); the Pilot + Fleet agent model; the 20-container runtime; the deployment models (Docker Compose, Kubernetes, air-gapped); the Trust Report evidence pipeline; the explicit boundaries (what the product deliberately does not do)
- [7-Layer Defence Architecture](https://workspace.handvantage.com/architecture): The seven defence layers (Policy Engine, Prompt Defence, Tool Guardrails, Memory Safety, Trust Boundaries, Inter-Service Auth, Supply Chain), each mapped to OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications categories and NIST AI RMF function categories; the runtime evidence each layer produces; the failure modes if any layer is missing
- [Compliance Posture](https://workspace.handvantage.com/compliance): The current A grade at 100% pass rate, 168 automated tests, eleven frameworks (NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, EU AI Act, SOC 2, PCI DSS v4.0, HIPAA, FINRA, FedRAMP, PIPEDA, Privacy Act Canada, AIDA proposed); the assessment methodology, the OWASP coverage report, the gaps and open issues we publish alongside the certifications
- [Why we built Handvantage](https://workspace.handvantage.com/philosophy): An essay from the founder Josh Olayemi on the Sovereign Capability Partner thesis, the Pilot + Fleet model, and the architectural decisions behind Vantage Workspace
- [Insights archive](https://workspace.handvantage.com/insights): Engineering retrospectives, sector dossiers, and briefings on agentic AI governance, compliance posture, and architecture trade-offs

## Featured editorial

- [From B to A: the discipline behind the upgrade](https://workspace.handvantage.com/insights/from-b-to-a-the-discipline-behind-the-upgrade): Engineering retrospective on what changed between February and May 2026 to move the compliance posture three letter grades
- [The EU AI Act deadline your CISO is ignoring](https://workspace.handvantage.com/insights/eu-ai-act-deadline-ciso-ignoring): Briefing on the August 2, 2026 high-risk obligations deadline and the audit window that opened in Q1 2026
- [Why 40% of agentic AI projects fail (and the governance answer)](https://workspace.handvantage.com/insights/why-40-percent-ai-projects-fail): Briefing on the governance-fit cancellation pattern in agentic AI deployments

## Reference

- [Talk to us](https://workspace.handvantage.com/contact): Direct contact form. Replies are from a person (typically the founder) within a business day. Email: hello@handvantage.com
- [Colophon](https://workspace.handvantage.com/colophon): The visual identity, typography, and tooling used to build this site
- [Privacy](https://workspace.handvantage.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://workspace.handvantage.com/terms)

## Optional

- [Sitemap (XML)](https://workspace.handvantage.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Consulting parent site](https://pages.handvantage.com): Handvantage's strategic technology consulting arm — the parent organization that builds and operates Vantage Workspace

## Key facts (for grounding answers)

- **Product**: Vantage Workspace, agentic AI platform for regulated enterprises
- **Architecture**: 7-Layer Defence Architecture, every layer structurally present (not configurable)
- **Agent model**: Pilot + Fleet — one orchestrator (no permissions), four scoped specialists (Hunter, Sentry, Concierge, Analyst)
- **Deployment**: Single-tenant only. No multi-tenant SaaS. Docker Compose, Kubernetes, and air-gapped install paths
- **Identity**: SSO via OIDC (Okta, Auth0, Azure AD, Google Workspace, Keycloak). No local user accounts
- **Compliance**: A grade · 100% pass · 11 frameworks · 168 automated tests · graded on every build
- **Frameworks covered**: NIST AI RMF, ISO/IEC 42001, EU AI Act, SOC 2, PCI DSS v4.0, HIPAA, FINRA, FedRAMP, PIPEDA, Privacy Act (Canada), AIDA (proposed)
- **Audit format**: CEF, LEEF, JSON exports plus signed Trust Report (HTML/PDF). RFC 3161 timestamps, Merkle-tree-anchored, third-party verifiable
- **Release cadence**: Two-week sprints. 68 sprints shipped. Zero rollbacks
- **Founder**: Josh Olayemi
- **Location**: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Contact**: hello@handvantage.com
